goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 09:45'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'stansted airport'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 09:45
The train should leave on thursday and should go to stansted airport
Make sure you get travel time and departure time
